# Install Blender

## Outcome

Blender launches successfully.

## Tools

- Browser
- PowerShell | optional

## Steps

1. Download the current Blender installer from the official Blender website.

2. Run the installer.

3. Accept the default install location.

4. Launch Blender.
   Expected: Blender opens to the default startup scene.
